query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Based on the FERC eLibrary search, Google (including Google LLC and Google Energy LLC) filed **5 filings** between June and December 2024, with the following docket numbers:

| # | Filing Title | Filed Date | Docket Number(s) |
|---|--------------|------------|------------------|
| 1 | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region of Google Energy LLC | June 28, 2024 | **ER10-468-005** |
| 2 | Motion to Intervene of Google LLC | September 19, 2024 | **ER24-2891-000, ER24-2888-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000, ER24-2889-000** |
| 3 | Supplement to Notice of Change in Status of Google Energy LLC | November 5, 2024 | **ER10-2835-011** |
| 4 | Post-Technical Conference Comments of Google LLC | December 10, 2024 | **AD24-11-000** |
| 5 | Triennial Market Power Analysis for SPP Region of Google Energy LLC | December 27, 2024 | **ER10-2835-012** |

**Summary of unique docket numbers:**
- **ER10-468-005** – Central Region market power analysis
- **ER24-2888-000, ER24-2889-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2891-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000** – Motion to intervene (6 related dockets)
- **ER10-2835-011** – Change in status supplement
- **ER10-2835-012** – SPP Region market power analysis
- **AD24-11-000** – Technical conference comments (rulemaking proceeding)

**Source:** FERC eLibrary AdvancedSearch API, searching for filings authored by "Google" or "Google Energy" between 2024-06-01 and 2024-12-31. Results saved to `/work/ferc_search_20260615_120530.csv`.
